channel.title: IndiaNewsAi — AI-Powered News Intelligence
channel.description: Real-time AI-powered news covering Delhi NCR, religion, politics, technology, entertainment, and world affairs.

item.title: Cisco Joins Anthropic's Project Glasswing for AI-Powered Cyber Defense
item.description: Cisco partners with Anthropic on Project Glasswing, a cross-industry initiative using AI for real-time cybersecurity threat detection and autonomous defense.

item.title: Microsoft Launches MAI In-House AI Models in Direct Challenge to OpenAI
item.description: Microsoft releases MAI-Transcribe-1, MAI-Voice-1, and MAI-Image-2 — its first in-house AI models after renegotiating its partnership contract with OpenAI.

item.title: Delhi Metro Phase-IV Corridor Receives Final Environmental Clearance
item.description: The Ministry of Environment has granted the final clearance for three new Delhi Metro Phase-IV corridors connecting Lajpat Nagar to Saket and Inderlok to Indraprastha, set to benefit over 8 lakh daily commuters.

item.title: Char Dham Yatra 2026 Registrations Cross 5 Lakh Mark in Record Time
item.description: The Uttarakhand government reports unprecedented demand for the annual Char Dham pilgrimage, with registrations crossing 5 lakh within the first week of portal opening.

item.title: IMD Issues Yellow Alert for Delhi NCR: Thunderstorm Expected Tonight
item.description: The India Meteorological Department has issued a yellow alert for Delhi and surrounding NCR regions, predicting thunderstorms with gusty winds up to 60 kmph and possible hailstorm activity.

item.title: Ram Navami Celebrations Draw Millions Across North India
item.description: Grand celebrations mark Ram Navami across Ayodhya, Delhi, and major North Indian cities with elaborate processions, cultural programmes, and community feasts.

item.title: Lok Sabha Passes Digital Personal Data Protection Amendment Bill
item.description: Parliament clears key amendments to the DPDP Act strengthening consent mechanisms and introducing penalties up to ₹500 crore for data breaches affecting Indian citizens.

item.title: Sufi Music Festival Returns to Nizamuddin Dargah After Three-Year Hiatus
item.description: The annual Sufi music and qawwali festival at Hazrat Nizamuddin Dargah resumes with performances by legendary qawwals and musicians from across South Asia.

item.title: Vaishno Devi Shrine Board Introduces AI-Powered Queue Management System
item.description: The Shri Mata Vaishno Devi Shrine Board launches an AI-driven crowd and queue management system to reduce waiting times and enhance pilgrim safety during peak season.

item.title: Noida Authority Approves ₹2,400 Crore Elevated Road Connecting Greater Noida to Jewar Airport
item.description: The Noida Authority has approved construction of a 21-km elevated corridor providing direct connectivity between Greater Noida and the upcoming Jewar International Airport.

item.title: Delhi Government Launches Free Heritage Walking Tours Covering 15 Mughal-Era Monuments
item.description: A new initiative by the Delhi Tourism Department offers free guided heritage walks covering lesser-known Mughal, Sultanate, and colonial-era monuments every weekend.

item.title: Dhurandhar 2 Crosses ₹1,000 Crore Mark — First Hindi Film of 2026 to Hit Milestone
item.description: Ranveer Singh's action sequel becomes the first Hindi film of 2026 to cross the ₹1,000 crore mark domestically, shattering box office records.

item.title: Iran Exits Nuclear Talks After Vance Team Trigger in Pakistan — Diplomatic Tensions Escalate
item.description: Iran FM Araghchi reveals breakdown in US-Iran nuclear talks in Islamabad after tensions with the Vance negotiation team, raising fears of regional instability.

item.title: Indian Railways Sanctions 100 Projects Worth ₹1.53 Lakh Crore — Record 110% Funding Jump
item.description: Indian Railways announces 100 new infrastructure projects with a record ₹1.53 lakh crore allocation, marking a 110% increase in funding for FY 2025-26.

item.title: Reliance Accelerates Battery Giga Factories and $110B AI Infrastructure Push
item.description: Reliance Industries pushes forward with green energy projects and massive AI investments to strengthen India's tech sovereignty.

item.title: April 2026 Street Style: Capris, Stripes, and Metropolitan Prep Define Spring Looks
item.description: Capri pants, bold stripes, and polished prep elements dominate April 2026 street style as spring fashion emphasizes versatility.

item.title: Shilpa Shetty's On-Set Burn Story and Kajol's DDLJ Endorsement Highlight Bollywood Resilience
item.description: Shilpa Shetty shares injury comeback tale while Kajol champions DDLJ in Academy romance poll, celebrating actress strength and legacy.

item.title: Wall Street Banks Begin Testing Anthropic's Restricted Claude Mythos AI Model
item.description: Leading banks including JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs test Anthropic's withheld Claude Mythos model internally amid ongoing AI safety concerns.

item.title: Israeli Strikes Continue in Lebanon, Testing Fragile US-Iran Ceasefire
item.description: Ongoing Israeli operations in Lebanon deepen uncertainty around the US-Iran ceasefire amid divergent interpretations of the agreement.

item.title: Dacoit Maintains Steady Box Office Run on Day 2 While Bhooth Bangla Faces Tough Competition
item.description: Dacoit earns ₹7 crore on day 2 amid clash with Bhooth Bangla, highlighting a competitive April 2026 for Bollywood releases.

item.title: India Leads G20 Climate-Tech Alliance, Pledges $10 Billion Green Energy Fund
item.description: India spearheads a new G20 Climate-Tech Alliance with a $10 billion green energy fund commitment, positioning itself as a leader in sustainable development.

item.title: Apple Vision Pro 2 Launches in India at ₹2,49,900 with Spatial Computing Breakthroughs
item.description: Apple brings Vision Pro 2 to India with lighter design, 8K micro-OLED displays, and spatial computing features that blur the line between digital and physical worlds.

item.title: IPL 2026: Record-Breaking Season Opener Draws 120 Million Viewers as New Teams Shine
item.description: IPL 2026 kicks off with record 120 million concurrent viewers as expansion teams deliver thrilling upsets in a blockbuster opening weekend.

item.title: Sabrina Carpenter Brings Major Hollywood Star Power to Coachella 2026 Performance
item.description: Sabrina Carpenter elevates her Coachella 2026 set with Hollywood celebrities and cinematic elements, creating a memorable festival moment.

item.title: Parliament Passes Landmark Digital India Budget 2026 with ₹2.5 Lakh Crore Tech Allocation
item.description: India's Parliament approves record ₹2.5 lakh crore technology allocation in Budget 2026, boosting AI research, semiconductor manufacturing, and rural broadband.

item.title: OpenAI Launches GPT-5 With Real-Time Reasoning and Autonomous Agent Capabilities
item.description: OpenAI unveils GPT-5 with breakthrough real-time reasoning, multi-step planning, and autonomous agent features that redefine enterprise AI applications.

item.title: Spring 2026 Fashion Trends: Windbreakers, Electric Florals, and CBK-Inspired Minimalism Dominate
item.description: Windbreakers, electric florals, and minimalist CBK-inspired looks emerge as dominant spring 2026 fashion trends across global runways and streets.

item.title: Met Gala 2026: 'Fashion Is Art' Theme and Star-Studded Co-Chairs Announced for May 4
item.description: Met Gala 2026 will feature the 'Fashion Is Art' theme with co-chairs Beyoncé, Nicole Kidman, Venus Williams, and Anna Wintour on May 4.

item.title: Anant Ambani's 31st Birthday Draws Wishes from Shah Rukh Khan and Salman Khan
item.description: Bollywood icons shower wishes on Anant Ambani as industry ties with corporate India strengthen amid box office milestones.

item.title: Alia Bhatt's Power-Packed 2026: Leading Ladies Gear Up with High-Octane Bollywood Projects
item.description: Alia Bhatt, Kriti Sanon, Sai Pallavi and more lead high-profile projects in a female-power year for Bollywood with spy thrillers and blockbusters.

item.title: Fashion: Spring 2026 Trends Spotlight Sporty Windbreakers, Capris, and Playful Layering
item.description: Sporty windbreakers, capris, and playful layering define Spring 2026 fashion as consumers embrace functional yet whimsical styles across global runways.

item.title: AI Updates: Meta Strikes Massive $21 Billion Compute Deal with CoreWeave Amid Aggressive AI Model Push
item.description: Meta secures massive AI computing capacity in a $21B deal with CoreWeave while launching a competitive new closed AI model for super intelligent applications.

item.title: Israeli Strikes in Lebanon Escalate Tensions, Jeopardizing US-Iran Ceasefire
item.description: Major airstrikes kill over 250 in Lebanon, endangering the recent US-Iran ceasefire agreement as international observers warn of wider conflict.

item.title: How to Choose an Event Management Company in Delhi? 7 Essential Things to Know
item.description: From corporate events to Bollywood celebrity bookings — the event industry in Delhi NCR is evolving rapidly. 7 expert tips for choosing the right partner and avoiding costly mistakes.
